# Superpowers Source Notes

These files are source snapshots used for attribution and traceability when adapting selected ideas from `obra/superpowers` into StackMoss.

- Upstream repo: `https://github.com/obra/superpowers`
- License: MIT
- Snapshot date: `2026-03-13`

Selected upstream sources:

- `tdd.source.md` from `skills/test-driven-development/SKILL.md`
- `systematic-debugging.source.md` from `skills/systematic-debugging/SKILL.md`
- `verification.source.md` from `skills/verification-before-completion/SKILL.md`
- `writing-plans.source.md` from `skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md`
- `receiving-code-review.source.md` from `skills/receiving-code-review/SKILL.md`

Rules for StackMoss:

- Do not compile these files directly into runtime outputs.
- Use them as upstream references only.
- Runtime outputs must use the adapted methodology layer in `src/compile/methodology.ts`.
